subject: Diglett, a small brown mole-like creature, emerging from disturbed earth
description: A very small, round brown creature with a tiny pink nose and a single tuft of brown hair emerges from broken, raised earth. The creature's body is mostly submerged, with only the head and small upper portion visible above the disturbed soil. Clumps of earth and dirt surround the emergence point. The raised earth and dirt tracks confirm the creature's burrowing activity. The art style is bright and charming with warm brown earth tones. The brown single hair tuft identifies this as Kanto Diglett, not Alolan form.
foreground: small brown creature emerging from broken earth
background: disturbed soil, raised earth mounds, dirt tracks
